title: erysimum amurense subsp. bungei
intro: Erysimum amurense subsp. bungei, also known as Amur wallflower, is a flowering plant species within the Brassicaceae family, characterized by its yellow flowers and erect habit. This plant is used in traditional medicine, particularly in China, where it is valued for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Erysimum amurense subsp. bungei include its ability to lower blood pressure, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. In herbal preparations, the plant's flowers and leaves are often used to make teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be taken to harness its medicinal properties.
